description: Creates a 3D graph container for rendering geometry, surfaces, and solids. Supports configurable coordinate system, axis ranges, grid plane toggles, origin offset, view scale, and font size.
utility: Create a 3D graph container for 3D geometry and surface rendering

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Logical position on the canvas using at(row, col)

arguments.name: view
arguments.description: Container dimensions using view(height, width) in logical units

arguments.name: range
arguments.description: Uniform axis range with optional step. Default: range(-3, 3, 1). Applied to all three axes

arguments.name: coordSystem
arguments.description: Coordinate system: lhs (default, Z up) or rhs (Y up)

arguments.name: xygrid
arguments.description: Toggle XY plane grid (z=0). On by default in new g3d

arguments.name: origin3d
arguments.description: Origin offset for the 3D coordinate system

arguments.name: viewscale3d
arguments.description: Zoom level. >1 zooms in, <1 zooms out

arguments.name: fs
arguments.description: Font size for tick labels and axis name labels

arguments.name: nolabel
arguments.description: Suppress tick labels and axis name labels

arguments.name: lockat
arguments.type: lockat(camX, camY, camZ, targetX, targetY, targetZ, zoom)
arguments.description: Lock camera to a specific position and target

alternates.syntax: g3d(at(5, 15), view(30, 30), range(-3, 3, 1), "lhs", xygrid(), origin3d(0, 0, 0), viewscale3d(1), fs(16))
alternates.description: Default expression when created via UI

alternates.syntax: g3d(at(5, 15), view(30, 30), range(-3, 3, 1), "lhs", xygrid(), yzgrid(), zxgrid())

alternates.description: Suppress tick labels and axis name labels

examples.expression: G = g3d(at(5, 15), view(30, 30), range(-3, 3, 1), "lhs", xygrid(), origin3d(0, 0, 0), viewscale3d(1), fs(16))

examples.scenario: 3D graph with custom origin and zoom
examples.expression: G = g3d(at(5, 15), view(30, 30), range(-3, 3, 1), "lhs", xygrid(), origin3d(1, 1, 0), viewscale3d(1.5), fs(16))
G = g3d(at(5, 15), view(30, 30), range(-3, 3, 1), "rhs", xygrid(), yzgrid(), zxgrid())

examples.scenario: 3D graph with LHS and custom range
